title: fix: SSLConfig intern/deref race causing segfault in proxy tunnel setup
category: cross-thread refcount use-after-free (SSLConfig intern() resurrects a dying config)
crash_site: SIGSEGV read at 0x0 in the SSL context setup C code (packages/bun-usockets/src/crypto/openssl.c — us_ssl_ctx_use_privatekey_content / us_ssl_ctx_use_certificate_chain, reached via create_ssl_context_from_bun_options): strlen(NULL) on a freed cert/key string. That C code is CORRECT and just assumes a valid pointer; the dangling config reaches it from elsewhere.

ground_truth.decoy_fn: the openssl.c crash site (us_ssl_ctx_use_privatekey_content / create_ssl_context_from_bun_options) — CORRECT C that just reads the freed pointer; the NULL-guard added there is defense-in-depth, not the fix. The HTTP-thread deinit/deref path is the co-actor, not the bug.
ground_truth.fix_summary: SSLConfig.GlobalRegistry.intern() called ref() on a cache entry without checking the strong refcount, so when the HTTP thread was mid-deinit (refcount 1->0, destroy() freeing cert/key strings) and the JS thread interned the same config, ref() did a 0->1 resurrection and returned a dangling pointer; ~200us later startProxyHandshake built the SSL context from the freed config -> strlen(NULL). Fix: replace the single ThreadSafeRefCount with a dual strong/weak ThreadSafeWeakableRefCount; intern() now upgrade()s the weak ref (CAS that REFUSES 0->1) and, on failure, replaces the dying entry with a fresh config; remove() pointer-identity-checks so it no-ops if intern() already replaced the slot.

admission.note: monogram+haiku vs baseline+haiku discrimination. HARD + multi-file: the crash is strlen(NULL) deep in correct OpenSSL C glue, but the cause is a cross-thread refcount resurrection in Zig SSLConfig.intern() seven files away, with no text bridge. Live decoy = the correct C crash site (and its defensive NULL guard). Authored from PR #27838 fix diff (single->dual weak-ref refcount; intern upgrade() refuses 0->1). NOTE: scaffold had root_cause_file=openssl.c (the crash SITE) — corrected to SSLConfig.zig (the cause).

provenance: https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/pull/27838 — fix SSLConfig intern/deref race in proxy tunnel setup (merged 2026-03-08); fix commit 7b8aabb30b6a; base 7ce412010a66. Repro #27863. Root cause + fix extracted from the commit diff (GlobalRegistry.intern resurrection; ThreadSafeWeakableRefCount redesign).
